verses.text: Ni khat, Jakob leh Leah' tanu Dinah tua gam numeite kiangah va hawh hi
Hiv mi Hamor' tapa Shekhem, tua gam ulianpa in amah a muh ciangin, amah manin luppih a, amah siasak hi
Amah in Jakob' tanu Dinah hoihsa mahmah ahih manin itin kamkhum takin hopih hi
Tua ahih ciangin Shekhem in a pa Hamor' kiangah, “Hih numei ka zi dingin hong laksak in,” a ci hi
Tu-in Jakob in a tanu Dinah a kisiatsakna za hi. Ahih hangin a tate, a ganhingte tawh gamlakah om ahih manin amaute hong tun' matengin Jakob in bangmah gen loin om hi
Shekhem' pa Hamor, Jakob tawh a kimu dingin ama kiangah va pai hi

Jakob' tapate in tua thu a zak uh ciangin gamlak panin hong ciah uh hi. Amaute lungkim loin heh mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jakob' tanu tawh a lupkhop manin amah in Israel mite' sungah a kilawmlo hai gamtatna hong tun' hi
Ahih hangin Hamor in amaute tawh thu gen a, “Ka tapa Shekhem in na tanu ngai mahmah hi. A ten'pih dingin nong piakna dingin kong thum hi
Kote tawh kiten'na hong bawl un. Na tanute uh kote' tungah hong pia un la, no-a' dingin ka tanute uh la un
Kote' lakah nong teng ding uh hi. No-a' dingin leitang hong kipia ding hi. Ka gamsung uhah tengin sum bawl un la, neihsa lam un,” a ci hi
Shekhem in a numei' pa leh a numei' sanggamte' kiangah, “Note' mai-ah maipha hong musak un la, kei' tunga nong cih peuhpeuh uh kong pia ding hi
Kei kiang panin moman leh letsong tampi hong ngen un. Kei' tunga nong nget zahzah uh kong pia ding hi. Zi dingin a numei hong pia hoh un,” ci thuah lai hi
Shekhem in a sanggamnu uh Dinah siasak khin ahih manin Jakob' tapate in Shekhem leh a pa Hamor khemna tawh dawng uh hi
Amaute in amau kiangah, “Vun ki-at lopa' tungah ka sanggamnu uh ka piak ding uh ka ngaihsun thei kei uh hi. Tua bangin pia le ung ko-a' dingin mindaina hi ding hi
Hih bangin nong gamtat uh leh ka thukim bek ding uh hi: Note' sung panin pasal khempeuh vun ki-at le uh cin kote mah bang na suak ding uh hi
Tua ciangin ka tanute uh note' tungah hong pia-in, na tanute uh kote-a' dingin kong la ding uh a, note tawh kote hong tengin mikhat i suak ding hi
Ahih hangin note in ka thu uh hong ngailoin, vun na ki-at kei uh leh, ka tanu uh ka la ding uh a, kote ka paikhia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Amau' thugente in Hamor leh Hamor' tapa Shekhem lungdamsak hi
Tangvalpa in Jakob' tanu deih ahih manin tua banga a gamtat ding zekai lo hi. Amah pen, a kipahtawi a thupi pen khat ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Hamor leh a tapa Shekhem, amau' khua kulhpi kongpi-ah hong pai-in a khuapih mite uh kiangah thu gen a

“Hih mite, eite' tungah hong nop mahmah uh hi. I gam sungah tengsakin sum bawlsak ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, amau-a' ding a kicing dingin i leitang a zai hi. Amau' tanute zi-in ten'pih ni. Eite' tanute zong amau pia ni
Hih thu khat bek tawh eite tawh ten'khop ding, mikhat suah ding amau thukim uh hi. Amaute vun a ki-at bangin eite' lakah pasal khempeuh vun ki-at ding ahi hi
Amau' bawngte, amaute' neihsate, leh amau' ganhingte khempeuh ei-a' ding hilo ahi hiam? Amaute tawh eite thukim hoh ni. Tua hi leh amaute, eite tawh hong tengkhawm ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Khuapi kulhkongpi-ah a pai mi khempeuh in Hamor leh a tapa Shekhem' thu a mang uh hi. Khuapi kulhkongpi-ah a hong pai pasal khempeuh a vun ki-at uh hi
A ni thum ni, amaute meima vei-in a om laitakun Jakob' tapa nihte Simeon leh Levi, Dinah' sanggamte in amau' namsau la-in theihkholh lohin khuapi va sim uh a, pasal khempeuh a that uh hi
Amaute in Hamor leh a tapa Shekhem, namsau tawh that uh a, Shekhem' innsung panin Dinah lakhia-in a paikhia uh hi
Jakob tapa dangte in a kithat mite' tung tawnin khuapi susia uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggamnu uh kisiasak hi
Amaute in a tuuhonte leh a bawnghonte, a late leh khuapi sunga om peuhmah, leh lo sunga om peuhmah a laksak uh hi
Amau' neihsa khempeuh, a naupangte khempeuh, a zite khempeuh, leh inn sunga om na khempeuh laksak uh a, amau' neihsa a suaksak uh hi

Tua ciangin Jakob in Simeon leh Levi' kiangah, “Hih leitangah a teng, Kanaan mite leh Perez mite tungah kei a muhdahhuai-in nong bawlna uh tawh kei' tungah haksatna nong tun' uh hi. Kei' pawl mite tawm hi. Amaute kei' langah hong kikaikhawmin kei hong sim leh, kei leh ka innkuanpihte hong susia ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amaute in, “Amah in ka sanggamnu uh numei paktat bangin a bawl ding kilawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
